text: Bitcoin is holding steady near $60k with minimal daily movement, while Ethereum trails slightly behind at modest gains, suggesting cautious consolidation among the majors rather than conviction in either direction. Extreme fear sentiment and falling dominance indicate investors are rotating into smaller-cap assets like Solana for speculative upside, a typical flight-to-volatility pattern when risk appetite remains suppressed. Volume at $96B sits near normal levels, reflecting neither capitulation selling nor sustained buying pressure.
